sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By registering on SmartRoooms, you agree to these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform. SmartRoooms is a student-focused room rental marketplace operating exclusively in Jaipur, Rajasthan.

sections.heading: 2. User Accounts
sections.content: You must provide accurate information including name, email, phone number, and role (tenant or owner). You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password. One account per person. Misrepresentation may lead to account suspension.

sections.heading: 3. Listings & Property Information
sections.content: Property owners must post genuine listings with accurate photos, pricing, and amenities. SmartRoooms reserves the right to verify and remove fraudulent listings. We do not charge brokerage — direct contact between owners and tenants is encouraged.

sections.heading: 4. Payments & Wallet
sections.content: Wallet balance and reward points are platform credits for discounts and rent payments within SmartRoooms. Cash withdrawal policies will be announced when payment gateway integration is live. Points have no cash value outside the platform.

sections.heading: 5. Referral Program
sections.content: Referral bonuses (₹150 cash credit) are awarded when a referred user completes a verified booking. Abuse of the referral system will result in forfeiture of rewards and account termination.

sections.heading: 6. Prohibited Conduct
sections.content: Users may not post fake listings, harass other users, share contact information for spam, or attempt to circumvent platform safety features. Complaints of misconduct will be investigated by our admin team.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: SmartRoooms connects tenants and owners but is not a party to rental agreements. We are not liable for disputes between users, property condition, or financial losses arising from offline agreements.

sections.heading: 8. Privacy
sections.content: Your data is used to provide services, improve listings, and communicate about bookings. We do not sell personal data to third parties. See our Privacy Policy for full details.

sections.heading: 9. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We may update these terms. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance. Material changes will be notified via email or platform notice.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.content: For questions: hello@smartroooms.in | Katewa Nagar, New Sanganer Road, Jaipur - 302020
